commits: 1111e2a - bober(sprint-5): add role-aware provider fallback for claude-code

filesChanged.description: resolveRoleProviders(config) -> role->provider map; tool roles on claude-code redirect to first non-claude-code provider or throw naming the role; prompt roles always allowed; logs per role via logger.info
11 tests: sc-5-1 override resolves, sc-5-2 throws naming role, sc-5-3 planner/researcher allowed, sc-5-4 logger per role
calls resolveRoleProviders(cfg) after parse before return; throw fails load
4 tests: sc-5-5 stuck-on-claude-code load rejects (real temp dir), regression guards for normal + planner-only configs

notes: NON-GATING preflightOpenaiPeer loader wiring SKIPPED (test-mocking concern; explicitly non-gating). Advisory persists: wire preflightOpenaiPeer at config load via an injectable importer in a follow-up.
